absorption: Ask agir (ask_vol 75 vs bid_vol 26) + positive delta 48 ama fiyat VAH altinda ve dusuyor = ASK ABSORPTION at resistance. CVD divergence ve tum HTF BEAR.
dom_observation: bid_ask_ratio 0.9 = satis baskisi basliyor, ask depth 64 > bid depth 57.
htf_alignment: Tum HTF BEAR (5m/15m/1h/4h) = SHORT icin KUSURSUZ uyum.
session_bias: buy_sell_ratio 1.42 bullish gorunse de, fiyat VAH altinda ve CVD divergence var = kurumsal satiysa, session numarası aldatici.
reasoning: Pozitif delta + ask absorption + CVD divergence + tum HTF BEAR + fiyat direnisten dusus = erken SHORT setup, absorption degistirecegi asker.
